category_sources: source_facts.description says MCP server for Atlassian tools; official README says MCP server for Atlassian products Confluence and Jira.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "MCP Atlassian"; source_facts.name is mcp-atlassian.
docs_sources: Official README states full documentation is at mcp-atlassian.soomiles.com and provides llms.txt and llms-full.txt documentation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository and official README identifies it as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify an MCP server for Jira and Confluence with tools reference and configuration docs.
